# rest_helm_release (Resource)

Manages a Helm release on a Kubernetes cluster.

## Schema

### Required

- `chart` (String) Chart reference: local path, repo/chartname, or OCI URL (oci://).
- `name` (String) Release name.

	~> If the value of this attribute changes, Terraform will destroy and recreate the resource.

### Optional

- `create_namespace` (Boolean) Create the namespace if it does not exist. Value defaults to `true`.
- `insecure_skip_tls_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS certificate verification for the K8s API server. Value defaults to `false`.
- `kube_context` (String) Kubeconfig context to use.
- `kubeconfig_path` (String) Path to the kubeconfig file.
- `namespace` (String) Kubernetes namespace for the release. Value defaults to `default`.
- `repository` (String) Chart repository URL.
- `set` (Map of Strings) Map of individual values to set (--set key=value).
- `set_sensitive` (Map of Strings, Sensitive) Map of sensitive values to set (stored encrypted in state).
- `timeout` (Int64) Timeout in seconds for Helm operations. Value defaults to `600`.
- `values` (String) JSON-encoded values to pass to the chart.
- `version` (String) Chart version constraint.
- `wait` (Boolean) Wait until all resources are ready. Value defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `app_version` (String) App version of the deployed chart.
- `chart_version` (String) Version of the deployed chart.
- `id` (String) Composite ID: namespace/name.

	~> Once set, the value of this attribute in state will not change.
- `status` (String) Release status (deployed, failed, etc.).
